interaction_history.content: Help me identify the gap in multi-agent AI research

content.main_response: What specific aspects of multi-agent AI do you believe are currently underexplored or overlooked in the existing literature?

transparency.explanation: This response aims to encourage the user to articulate their perspective on multi-agent AI, which can help identify specific gaps in the research.
transparency.what_to_verify: Check recent literature and reviews on multi-agent AI to see if specific underexplored areas are mentioned.

content.main_response: Consider focusing on the structure and organization of your research paper. Identify your main argument or thesis statement, and then outline how each section will support this central idea, ensuring that your literature review, methodology, and findings all connect logically to your research question. This approach will help maintain clarity and coherence throughout your writing.

transparency.explanation: This response was generated to provide guidance on organizing research papers effectively.
transparency.what_to_verify: Check the specific requirements for organization and structure in your field of study or journal guidelines.

content.main_response: Which part of this feels least certain to you?

transparency.explanation: The response aims to encourage deeper reflection on the user's uncertainties in the academic writing process.
transparency.what_to_verify: The relevance of the user's concerns to their current academic research context.

reflection.reflection_prompt: Which part of this feels least certain to you?

content.main_response: Can you summarize what you understand so far in your own words?

transparency.explanation: The response encourages the user to articulate their understanding, fostering engagement and clarity.
transparency.what_to_verify: Whether there is a mutual understanding of the topic prior to summarization.

challenge.prompt: Can you summarize what you understand so far in your own words?
